category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides OpenBSD freely licensed SSH connectivity tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openssh and source_facts.homepage is the official OpenSSH site.
docs_sources: The official OpenSSH site provides manual pages at /manual.html.
repo_sources: The official OpenSSH portable release page lists https://anongit.mindrot.org/openssh.git as the portable OpenSSH source tree.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ssh, sshd, scp, sftp, ssh-keygen, and related OpenSSH tools.
